build:bundle:browser.command: mkdir -p target/bundle && deno bundle --platform=browser --format=iife --minify src/mod.ts > target/bundle/index.browser.js

build:bundle:browser:obfuscated.description: Optionally obfuscate browser bundle into target/bundle/index.browser.obfuscated.js
build:bundle:browser:obfuscated.command: deno run -A npm:javascript-obfuscator target/bundle/index.browser.js --output target/bundle/index.browser.obfuscated.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --split-strings true --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --unicode-escape-sequence true --target browser

build:bundle:node.command: mkdir -p target/bundle && deno bundle --platform=deno --format=esm --minify src/mod.ts > target/bundle/index.node.js

build:bundle:node:obfuscated.description: Optionally obfuscate node bundle into target/bundle/index.node.obfuscated.js
build:bundle:node:obfuscated.command: deno run -A npm:javascript-obfuscator target/bundle/index.node.js --output target/bundle/index.node.obfuscated.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --split-strings true --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --unicode-escape-sequence true --target node

build:binary.command: mkdir -p target/binary && deno compile -A --output target/binary/app src/mod.ts

build:npm.description: Build npm package into target/npm using dnt
build:npm.command: deno eval "const cfg = JSON.parse(await Deno.readTextFile('deno.json')); const { build, emptyDir } = await import('@deno/dnt'); await emptyDir('./target/npm'); await build({ entryPoints: ['./src/mod.ts'], outDir: './target/npm', shims: { deno: true }, scriptModule: false, typeCheck: false, declaration: 'separate', test: false, package: { name: cfg.name, version: cfg.version, description: cfg.description } });"

check.description: Run format, lint, type, and docs checks

check:dependencies.description: Verify dependencies and lockfile are in sync

check:docs.description: Lint JSDoc and validate doc code blocks
check:docs.command: deno doc --lint src/ && deno check --doc-only src/

check:publish:jsr.description: Verify JSR publish flow with a dry-run

check:publish:npm.description: Verify npm publish flow with a dry-run

check:publish.description: Verify dry-run publish flows for JSR and npm
check:publish.command: deno task check:publish:jsr && deno task check:publish:npm

check:types.description: Run type checking with plain deno check

publish.description: Run checks, then publish package to JSR and npm
publish.command: deno task publish:jsr && deno task publish:npm

publish:npm.description: Publish npm package from target/npm (requires npm auth)

security:secrets.description: Scan repository and Git history for leaked credentials (requires gitleaks)

security:secrets:files.description: Scan working tree for leaked credentials (requires gitleaks)

security:secrets:history.description: Scan Git history for leaked credentials (requires gitleaks)

setup:dependencies.description: Install project dependencies into Deno cache

update.description: Update dependencies within current semver ranges

update:latest.description: Update dependencies to latest versions (ignore current semver ranges)

version.command: deno eval "const cfg = JSON.parse(await Deno.readTextFile('deno.json')); const rows = [['Name', cfg.name ?? ''], ['Version', cfg.version ?? ''], ['Description', cfg.description ?? '']]; const width = Math.max(...rows.map((row) => row[0].length)); console.log('Package metadata'); console.log('----------------'); for (const row of rows) { console.log(row[0].padEnd(width) + ' : ' + row[1]); }"
